title: Keep the extended subject-based canonical family as the main spine
why_justified: The extended package was the strongest pre-existing canonical candidate and already restored governance and operational seams that were still underrepresented elsewhere.
impact: Prevents regression to the lean package or to shorter incomplete summaries.

title: Preserve governed package lifecycle and runtime-health quality interpretation as first-class MVP truth
why_justified: Repeated governance/revision sources and the extension package show this is not optional polish but part of how WoS governs changes and reads degraded runtime quality.
source_basis: older governance/revision MVP material, extension package docs, current admin docs
impact: Makes package history, preview, rollback, findings, and runtime-health interpretation durable in the canonical MVP.

title: Preserve operational settings, secrets, costs, budgets, alerts, and MCP cockpit visibility
why_justified: Multiple source families treat operator governance and visibility as part of the product, not as hidden deployment folklore.
source_basis: settings-governance MVPs, repo ops docs, extension package docs
impact: Stops later consolidations from reducing WoS to runtime-only behavior without operator governance.

title: Add an explicit canonical section for AI stack, bounded research/improvement, and staged MCP support
why_justified: This subsystem is repeatedly present in roadmap documents, repository code, and user-facing architecture truth, but remained too implicit in the prior canonical family.
impact: Preserves the support-stack architecture without creating a second truth boundary.

title: Refresh direct rerun evidence in the final pass
why_justified: The assignment explicitly requires an implementation/evidence reality check rather than inheritance alone.
source_basis: direct reruns performed in this pass
impact: Supports a fresh, contradiction-honest runtime-proof reading.

title: Replay backend/frontend Flask-backed route proofs in a provisioned environment
why_justified: These are high-value end-to-end proof surfaces but are blocked in this container by missing Flask.
source_basis: targeted pytest failures during this pass; prior validation corpus
impact: Needed for stronger route-level replay claims.

title: Replay full preview/evaluation/promotion/rollback lifecycle end to end
why_justified: Governed lifecycle is clearly source-supported, but this pass did not freshly prove the entire chain live.
source_basis: governance/revision MVPs, extension package, current admin docs
impact: Required before calling the full lifecycle runtime-proof-ready.

title: Close the committed-path vs live-room dual-surface player contract with explicit replay evidence
why_justified: Transport discipline is canonical but still a live proof seam.
source_basis: shell-loop docs/reports, 07 and 13 canonical docs, blocked frontend/backend reruns
impact: Needed to remove residual ambiguity between player-visible session surfaces.

title: Replay graph-heavy LangGraph/LangChain fallback and orchestration paths in a fully provisioned environment
why_justified: The skipped graph-heavy AI-stack proof still limits stronger closure language.
source_basis: skipped breadth-playability test and prior reports
impact: Needed for stronger claims around orchestration-heavy support flows.

title: Promote to evaluator-independent Level B closure
why_justified: Source family aspires to stronger proof, but evidence in this pass still supports strong Level A more honestly.
source_basis: G9B/G10 audit docs and existing canonical proof docs

title: Treat MCP, agentics, or research tooling as direct truth authority
why_justified: Contradicted by the one-truth model and repeated authority laws.
source_basis: runtime constitution, boundary docs, MCP roadmap, research MVP
impact: Keeps support layers subordinate to runtime authority.

title: Broaden the MVP into open-ended sandbox or multi-module freeform narrative scope
why_justified: Explicitly outside the MVP scope in roadmap and slice-contract materials.
impact: Preserves WoS MVP identity and focus.
